verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How many times have I often felt Is God with me or am I fooling myself Sometimes I think all I can see Is little of Him and too much of me I said I want Him to have full control Then let my passion hinder my goal The war is raging all of the time I've got to quit looking through These eyes of mine

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And look through the eyes of perfection They see no fault at all Just a finished work, Not the many times I fall His eyes are the eyes of love

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And when I see every flaw in my life Oh, how I stand condemned But He looks at me so differently He sees me perfect Through His eyes of love for me
